text: Here, I feel a sense of curiosity and displacement. The glass walls and sterile hallway conjure an impression of boundaries—between inside and outside, public and private, observer and participant. Moving into the R+D space, the vibrant colors and displays stimulate my mind and urge me to reflect on innovation and collective intelligence. The words about feeling adrift and uncertain resonate with me; in these artificial, curated environments, I become hyper-aware of both my solitude and my latent connection to others who have passed through, leaving traces in research and development. Caught between anticipation and hesitation, I wonder: how much of myself do I bring into these structured, purpose-driven spaces, and how much do I leave behind?
